response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Verified the reference JSON which correctly noted that IRyS makes spoken announcements in both English and Japanese with no vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: Prepared the manual transcription and translation for all spoken parts as the reference JSON did not contain the text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken subtitles tightly to the vocal delivery and did not output any subtitles during the pure instrumental outro section after 01:12.000 to prevent hallucination.

subtitles.original: Tokyo at SGC Hall Ariake, woo!
subtitles.english: Tokyo at SGC Hall Ariake, woo!

subtitles.original: And it will be held on a Tuesday on October 6th.
subtitles.english: And it will be held on a Tuesday on October 6th.

subtitles.original: I'm super, super, super excited for this, and I'm so glad I've got to finally announce it!
subtitles.english: I'm super, super, super excited for this, and I'm so glad I've got to finally announce it!

subtitles.original: So I hope you guys will be really excited for it as well, yay!
subtitles.english: So I hope you guys will be really excited for it as well, yay!

subtitles.original: あとね、えっとソロライブも決まりました！
subtitles.english: Also, my solo concert has been decided!

subtitles.original: 場所は東京、SGCホール有明でございます。
subtitles.english: The venue is Tokyo, SGC Hall Ariake.

subtitles.original: えーっと、開催される日程は10月6日火曜日です。
subtitles.english: And the date of the event is Tuesday, October 6th.

subtitles.original: すっごく楽しみにしてるし、
subtitles.english: I'm really looking forward to it,

subtitles.original: もうとにかく、もうこんなライブがやれる機会自体が本当に、
subtitles.english: and honestly, an opportunity to perform a concert like this...

subtitles.original: まさかできると思ってなくて、
subtitles.english: I never thought it would actually be possible,

subtitles.original: とってもワクワクしてますし、これからも準備頑張ります！
subtitles.english: so I'm super excited and will do my best preparing for it from now on!

subtitles.original: Please look forward to further details and information in the future!
subtitles.english: Please look forward to further details and information in the future!

subtitles.original: Last but not least, there will be a members-only part starting at 1:30 PM pretty soon,
subtitles.english: Last but not least, there will be a members-only part starting at 1:30 PM pretty soon,

subtitles.original: so please come check it out if you can and join the family.
subtitles.english: so please come check it out if you can and join the family.

subtitles.original: 最後に、メンバー限定パートが1時半から始まるので、
subtitles.english: Lastly, the members-only part starts at 1:30,

subtitles.original: よかったらメンバーに入って見に来てね！
subtitles.english: so if you'd like, please join the membership and come watch!

subtitles.original: では、ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Well then, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Thank you very much! Bye for now! Until the members' part!
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Bye for now! Until the members' part!
